description: You are an auditor verifying the Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) for 'Sport-100 Helmet, Red' (ProductID 707) for Q3 2012 (July 1 to Sept 30). Implement a First-In-First-Out (FIFO) inventory allocation algorithm in SQL using supply data from Inventory.InputBatches and demand data from Sales.SalesOrderDetail for the specified product and date range. Create a schema named Accounting and a table Accounting.FIFOAllocation with columns SalesOrderID (int), SalesOrderDetailID (int), BatchID (int), QtyAllocated (int), and UnitCost (money). Populate this table by allocating sales orders to inventory batches using strict FIFO logic, ensuring oldest batches are consumed first and handling split orders where one line item spans multiple batches. The total allocated quantity must match the total sales quantity exactly.
